authEntrypoints.description: Receives portal_code from broker launch redirect and mints a local session

requiredEnv.name: PORTAL_ORIGIN
requiredEnv.description: Origin of the COMS portal broker (e.g. https://coms.ahacommerce.net)

requiredEnv.name: PORTAL_APP_SLUG
requiredEnv.description: App slug registered with the portal — heroes

requiredEnv.name: PORTAL_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_EMAIL
requiredEnv.description: Portal Cloud Run SA email — used to verify Authorization: Bearer Google ID tokens on inbound webhooks (Rev 2 §03)

requiredEnv.name: SELF_PUBLIC_URL
requiredEnv.description: Heroes' own public URL — used as the expected 'aud' claim when verifying portal-issued ID tokens (Rev 2 §03)

appRoles.label: Team Leader
appRoles.description: Can submit points for team members

appRoles.label: HR
appRoles.description: Can manage users and view reports

notes: Closed registration: 403 on portal users with no row in local users/userEmails table.
Local sessions reuse the existing better-auth session/user tables; cookie name is coms_session.
Currently deployed on Cloud Run URL; subdomain heroes.ahacommerce.net not yet provisioned.
Runtime reads PORTAL_ORIGIN env; adapter.brokerOrigin here is informational only.
